description: A growing sole proprietorship is considering changing its business structure (e.g., to an LLC or S-Corp) for liability protection and tax reasons.

nodes.task_description: Discuss the owner's goals regarding liability, taxes, and administrative complexity.
Explain the tax and legal characteristics of different business entities (LLC, S-Corp, C-Corp).

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly outlines the pros and cons of each structure.

nodes.task_description: Provide a recommendation for the most suitable business structure based on the client's specific situation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent recommends forming an LLC and making an S-Corp tax election.
